purpose: Defines an enum representing different types of enemy wave patterns in a game, each with specific movement paths, segments, and total frames. Each wave type includes precomputed Bézier curve coordinates for enemy movement paths.

parameters.name: waveSegments
parameters.description: Number of segments the wave path is divided into

parameters.name: totalFrames
parameters.description: Total number of frames for the wave animation

parameters.name: totalFrames
parameters.description: Total number of frames for the path segment

parameters.name: ap0
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the first anchor point (x, y)

parameters.name: cp1
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the first control point (x, y)

parameters.name: cp2
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the second control point (x, y)

parameters.name: ap3
parameters.description: Array of doubles representing the second anchor point (x, y)

return value.description: List of WaveCoordinate objects representing the path coordinates for each frame
